touches.ai_summary: Initial outreach via LinkedIn to Quinn Diallo. Rep introduced AskElephant's CRM automation capabilities for managed IT firms. Quinn responded positively, expressing interest in learning more about workflow automation to reduce manual data entry across their tech stack.

10-minute qualification call with Quinn Diallo (Director of CS). Quinn confirmed they're using multiple tools for client management but struggling with data sync and manual CRM updates. Discussed team size (11 CS/account managers) and current pain points around client handoffs and follow-up tracking.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the need to look at CRM automation right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our CS team is spending 5-6 hours per week on manual CRM updates and we're missing follow-ups because data isn't syncing between our ticketing system and CRM

questions_asked.question: Does this work with ConnectWise and HubSpot?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both platforms and can sync bidirectionally

next_steps: Schedule demo for Quinn and team

touches.ai_summary: 27-minute demo with Quinn Diallo. Call was rescheduled once due to Quinn's conflict. Walked through CRM automation workflows, ConnectWise integration, and automated client communication triggers. Quinn was engaged and asked detailed questions about setup time and customization. Mentioned wanting to loop in Lauren White (CRO) before moving forward.

questions_asked.question: How long does initial setup typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks including integration configuration and workflow customization with our CSM team

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation rules based on client segments?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - you can create unlimited automation rules and segment by any field in your CRM

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision on this?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to have something in place by end of quarter, but I need to get Lauren our CRO aligned on budget first

objections: Need to confirm budget availability with CRO before proceeding
next_steps: Quinn to brief Lauren White on solution

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Quinn after demo. Rep sent formal proposal with 11-seat unlimited automation plan at $8,300 ACV (28% discount applied to meet Quinn's budget constraints mentioned in side conversation). Quinn responded confirming he reviewed with Lauren and they're ready to move forward pending contract review.

questions_asked.question: Can you send over the MSA so our legal team can review?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, attaching our standard MSA - turnaround is usually 3-5 business days

next_steps: Schedule kickoff call for following week
